steps.title: Apply the equality from the given condition
steps.content: Two equal fractions with different denominators force the numerator to be $0$: $x-17=0$, so $x=17$.

steps.title: Compute the target value
steps.content: Then $x+17 = 17+17 = 34$. That matches choice D — D is correct.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: As a final check, compare the result from the work to the answer choices. The value, equation, or condition found above matches choice D, $34$, and the other choices fail the same setup or substitution. Therefore D is correct.
